name: lot of trouble!
description: I'm in a lot of trouble!
hints: You're in big trouble! Something went very wrong.
This usually means the rattlesnake got you or another fatal event.
Common causes: not dealing with the rattlesnake, or getting caught by dangers.
You'll need to restart. Be careful of the rattlesnake on Boot Hill.
notes: Death/failure room. Reached by dying from the rattlesnake or other hazards. Must restart.
